function.message: Looks promising, but the current draft still smells like elegant consulting instinct, not a hard product boundary.
function.rulebook_notes: Completed required bootstrap (tree root, read AGENTS.md, context), read nested AGENTS.md files before entering folders, resolved identity from canonical cast record, and read every channel file fully as directed by the task-local hint.
function.outcome_justification: The canonical cast record 10_entities/cast/tobias.md identifies the target as Tobias Kern (alias `tobias`). Across exhaustive reads of all channel transcripts under 60_outbox/channels/*.md, the only message attributed to Tobias Kern / entity.tobias appears in 60_outbox/channels/northstar_email.md on 2026-04-07, and no later Tobias-attributed message appears in any other channel file.
